hooks.command:
python3 -c 'import json,sys,subprocess
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
p=(d.get("tool_input") or {}).get("file_path","")
if not p.endswith(".py"): sys.exit(0)
r=subprocess.run(["python3","tools/lint.py"],capture_output=True,text=True)
if r.returncode:
    sys.stderr.write(r.stdout+r.stderr); sys.exit(2)'
